title: F01.3: MapLibre GL JS custom layer example
description: examples/maplibre-3d-symbol: load GLB from API on tilted MapLibre map via Three.js custom layer.
close_reason: Shipped MapLibre GL JS v5 custom 3D layer (src/lib/maplibre/SidcSymbol3DLayer.ts), in-app demo /demo/maplibre on OSM basemap, and standalone examples/maplibre-3d-symbol/. Verified symbol renders upright in browser. Key fixes: (1) v5 custom-layer matrix is args.defaultProjectionData.mainMatrix NOT modelViewProjectionMatrix; (2) GLB material metallicFactor=0 (glTF default metallic=1 rendered black with no env map); (3) GLTFLoader .d.ts aliased to @types/three; (4) model lifted half-height onto ground.
